name: Very Filmy
overview: Compelled to tie the knot despite the drive for different destinations, Daniya and Rohaan, are weaved in the drape of love by fate. Rohaan, arriving from abroad, is hesitant to marry a desi girl he's never met.

trailers.title: Very Filmy - Teaser Coming Soon [ Dananeer Mobeen & Ameer Gilani ] - HUM TV
